name: tink-forge-suggestion
description: Optional Claude Code hook template. Use only after /tink-setup approval. It should provide short advisory-only automatic suggestions, not auto-apply harnesses.
behavior: Registered as a Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook only when the user selects the hook component. It reads the prompt from stdin, emits at most one advisory line when /tink-forge would help, and never auto-applies harnesses or saves memory.
